scenarios.root_cause: Agent guesses wrong absolute paths for already-indexed files (different wrong path each turn). Should use session-aware document list.

search_file tool only scans standard Windows user folders (Documents, Downloads, Desktop) — does not search project subdirectories. Agent never used browse_files to explore project tree. No strategy adaptation when search fails.
scenarios.recommended_fix: 1. search_file should scan CWD subdirectories recursively when common-folder search fails. 2. Agent system prompt should include browse project directory fallback. 3. Agent should escalate tool strategy when Turn N approach failed.

cost.note: All inference is local (Qwen3 on AMD GPU). No cloud API cost for agent inference. Claude as judge billed separately.

known_bugs.description: Agent guesses wrong absolute paths for already-indexed files. E.g., constructs C:\Users\14255\employee_handbook.md instead of full corpus path.
known_bugs.recommended_fix: Inject session document paths into agent system context at turn start, OR fallback to session documents before failing with not-found.

known_bugs.description: search_file tool only scans standard Windows user folders; does not search project subdirectories.
known_bugs.recommended_fix: Expand search_file to recursively scan CWD tree when user-folder search returns empty.

known_bugs.description: When Turn 1 tool search fails, agent repeats same failed strategy in Turn 2 with no adaptation.
known_bugs.recommended_fix: Add to agent prompt: if search returns empty, try browse_files on project directory before giving up.
